blockers: Missing visual_presentation declaration for visual artifact
Declaration uses default browser styles or no design system
No WCAG 2.2 AA target or missing focus/touch/drag alternatives
No mobile-first confirmation for Google Sites/iPad use
Motion lacks purpose or reduced-motion support
No rendered screenshot/state evidence before promotion

routing_rule.mpp_binding: Before implementation: require declaration. During implementation: require design-token binding. Before promotion: require static/render/human-review evidence.

why_not_html_cartridge_only: HTML cartridges can implement visual rules for HTML, but dashboards, trackers, landing pages, and teacher tools also need visual governance.
MPP must route any visual artifact to the gate before promotion.
why_not_uss_only: USS declares usefulness dimensions; visual quality requires artifact-type-specific aesthetics, accessibility, platform, and render verification.
Putting only visual_presentation into USS would create a checkbox field and would not force purpose-specific research or rendered proof.
